utterances.text: I am guess I am just done with the whole dating thing .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It is one more thing in my life that is suddenly completely different .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: On the other hand in um , in about seven months you are gonna have something that you are gonna love more than any guy you have ever gone out with .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wait until uh , wait until the first time your baby grabs your finger .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You wanna , you wanna grab some coffee ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh no , I think I am gonna go home and eat ten candy bars .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , I thought I cheered you up .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh you did , there are twenty in here .
